requirements.task_name: Save the newest fantasy worldbuilding blog post to your reading list
requirements.task_description: Locate blog posts about worldbuilding, filter to the Fantasy tag, sort by newest first, open the most recent post, and save it to your reading list.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the newsletter with monthly Fantasy and Sci-Fi updates
requirements.task_description: Sign up with name/email, select monthly frequency, and choose only Fantasy and Science Fiction as preferred genres with blog updates included.

requirements.task_name: Add the cheapest 'Chronicles of Aria' ebook under $6 to your wishlist
requirements.task_description: Filter books to the 'Chronicles of Aria' series, ebook format, max price $6, sort by lowest price, and add the cheapest qualifying book to the wishlist.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Spring Reading Plan' list with the first 3 'Skyward Saga' books in order
requirements.task_description: Create a reading list named 'Spring Reading Plan' and add the first three 'Skyward Saga' books (oldest publication dates first) to that list in order.

requirements.task_name: Register for an online Live Q&A event next month in the evening and save it to your events
requirements.task_description: Find an online Live Q&A event scheduled for the next calendar month, pick a session starting at or after 6:00 PM, register as Jordan Lee, and add it to My Events.

requirements.task_name: Copy a share link for the most-liked quote from 'The Moonlit Archive'
requirements.task_description: Filter quotes to 'The Moonlit Archive', sort by most liked, open the top quote, and copy its shareable link.

required_variables.set_condition: When a quote is found (index !== -1) and its share link is generated/ensured, immediately before returning the shareUrl/shareSlug.
required_variables.value_to_set: The quoteId argument passed into getQuoteShareLink (e.g., localStorage.setItem('task6_shareLinkQuoteId', quoteId)).
required_variables.reason: Records exactly which quote’s share link the user requested so the evaluator can verify it is the most-liked quote associated with the book 'The Moonlit Archive'.

requirements.task_name: Add a digital bundle under $25 with at least 4 ebooks to your cart
requirements.task_description: Filter to digital/ebook bundles priced under $25 with at least 4 books, open the first qualifying bundle, and add one copy to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Post a comment on the most-commented 'Writing Tips' blog post from 2024
requirements.task_description: Find blog posts tagged 'Writing Tips' from 2024, sort by most commented, open the top post, and submit a specific comment as Taylor.
